case_title: LIE CHAO GAO VS. PHAU THIEN LAM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAO, LIE CHAO AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, PHAU THIEN , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NEW HOME MENU RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
